practice.name: Problem 17 (2013 AMC 12B)
practice.statement: Real numbers $x$, $y$, and $z$ satisfy the equations $x + y + z = 1$ and $x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = 2$. What is the maximum value of $z$?

practice.name: Problem 7 (2024 AIME I)
practice.statement: Find the largest possible real part of $(75 + 117i)z + \dfrac{96 + 144i}{z}$, where $z$ is a complex number with $|z| = 4$.
